pages.text: Tig’s mom is a scientist. She knows things.

blocks.text: Tig’s mom is a scientist. She knows things.

pages.text: Tig’s dad is a writer. He makes things up.

blocks.text: Tig’s dad is a writer. He makes things up.

pages.text: Tig has a globe. “Mom, if the world is round, why don’t the people on the bottom fall off?”

blocks.text: “Mom, if the world is round, why don’t the people on the bottom fall off?”

pages.text: “Because gravity pulls everyone towards the middle of the Earth.”

blocks.text: “Because gravity pulls everyone towards the middle of the Earth.”

pages.text: “Wherever you go, the Earth feels like it is below you. Unless you go into space. Then there’s no down at all, and you float!”

blocks.text: “Wherever you go, the Earth feels like it is below you. Unless you go into space. Then there’s no down at all, and you float!”

pages.text: “People on the other side of the Earth think that they are the right way up... ...and we are upside down! Isn’t that amazing!”

blocks.text: “People on the other side of the Earth think that they are the right way up...
...and we are upside down! Isn’t that amazing!”

pages.text: “Dad, if the world is round, why don’t the people on the bottom fall off?”

blocks.text: “Dad, if the world is round, why don’t the people on the bottom fall off?”

pages.text: “Oh, they used to! A lot of people fell off... ...and ended up on Saturn.”

blocks.text: “Oh, they used to! A lot of people fell off...

pages.text: “But some people got caught in the branches of trees. They climbed up to the ground, and dug tunnels so they could get around without falling.”

blocks.text: “But some people got caught in the branches of trees. They climbed up to the ground, and dug tunnels so they could get around without falling.”

pages.text: “Now they’ve built upside-down houses, and they swing between them on ropes!”

blocks.text: “Now they’ve built upside-down houses, and they swing between them on ropes!”

pages.text: Tig is pretty sure someone is making things up.

blocks.text: Tig is pretty sure someone is making things up.
